data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of tracking cancellation and no-show rates. While the evidence provided mentions a no-show rate of 8%, it does not include any details on cancellation rates, which is a critical part of the requirement. This lack of comprehensive data indicates a gap in meeting the requirement for cancellation and no-show rates as specified in the exploratory step.
gaps: No evidence of cancellation rates provided.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add cancellation rate tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure cancellation rates are tracked and reported alongside no-show rates.
